id: conduct a review to improve development efficiency
intention: 做一次评审或检查来提升开发效率
naturalChunk: conduct a review to improve development efficiency
sentencePatterns: We need to conduct a review to ...
The team is conducting a review to ...
realLifeExamples: We are conducting a review to improve our development efficiency.
The team is conducting a review to reduce repeated mistakes.
usageNotes: conduct 常接 review, survey, research, experiment 这类正式活动。improve efficiency 是高频搭配。
productionPrompts: 用 We need to conduct a review to ... 造一句和工作流程或学习方法有关的英文句子。
